description: Style NoteRevel in the comfort of soft fabric with this Modern trunk Elance brief from jockey. The superior fabric provides breathable comfort, while the cut offers easy leg movement. The printed label allows abrasion free comfort and the double layered fly construction offers maximum supportProduct DetailsContoured pouch design for maximum comfort and supportUnique leg treatment that eliminates the fabric from riding upNew ultra soft waistband that provides super soft, smooth  and comfortable gripMid rise FitMaterial and Care100% premium combed cottonMachine wash delicate at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach, iron or dry cleanFlat dry in shade
